title: RepoStatsEntry Collection
description: Array of RepoStatsEntry records. Each element: GitHub/Zenodo repository metrics for a single artifact (stars, forks, views, downloads).

RepoStatsEntry.description: GitHub/Zenodo repository metrics for a single artifact (stars, forks, views, downloads).

title.description: Full paper title associated with this repository.
title.title: Title

github_stars.description: GitHub star count at time of collection. Null for non-GitHub platforms.
github_stars.title: Github Stars

github_forks.description: GitHub fork count at time of collection. Null for non-GitHub platforms.
github_forks.title: Github Forks

zenodo_views.description: Zenodo page view count. Null for non-Zenodo platforms.
zenodo_views.title: Zenodo Views

zenodo_downloads.description: Zenodo file download count. Null for non-Zenodo platforms.
zenodo_downloads.title: Zenodo Downloads

description.description: Repository description from the hosting platform, truncated to 120 characters. Null if not available.
description.title: Description

language.description: Primary programming language as reported by the platform, e.g. 'Python', 'C++'. Null if not available.
language.title: Language

name.description: Repository identifier, e.g. 'microsoft/nni'. Null for non-GitHub/GitLab platforms.
name.title: Name

pushed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last push/update, e.g. '2024-07-15T10:30:00Z'. Null if not available.
pushed_at.title: Pushed At

RepoStatsEntry.title: RepoStatsEntry
